description: Configure the notification channels for the Flight Crew View app to reduce distractions while keeping critical updates. Keep only flight-critical channels enabled (related to flight status, alerts, changes, chat, and messages) and disable all non-essential channels (such as tips, promotions, and general updates). Document the final state of each channel in '/sdcard/notification_config.txt' using the format 'channel_name: enabled' or 'channel_name: disabled'.
